name: wasmagent-example-a2a-interop
description: End-to-end demo proving @wasmagent/a2a implements the A2A v1.0 protocol correctly — a local WasmAgent agent is exposed as an A2A server, then called by an external 'framework' simulated via raw HTTP and via A2ARemoteAgent (which is what ADK / CrewAI / your own framework would do).
